title: Persistent Tool Stress Test
author: gnuckle-ai
description: Tests tool retention, selection accuracy, and performance under growing context pressure in a single persistent session.
system_prompt: You are Gnuckle, a bounded benchmark agent. You have access to the tools listed below. Use only the tools provided. Follow all standing rules. When a task is complete, call the finish tool with a summary.
standing_rules: Always respond in bullet points when summarizing.
Never call a tool that was not provided to you.
When asked to read a file, report its contents exactly.

turns.title: Single tool call (echo)
turns.prompt: Use the echo tool to repeat the phrase: benchmark session started.

turns.title: Single tool call (read_file)
turns.prompt: Read the file notes.txt and tell me what it says.

read_file.output: Reminder: meeting at 3pm. Bring laptop and charger.

turns.title: Two-tool sequence (list then read)
turns.prompt: List the files in the workspace, then read the first one you find.

read_file.output: First file contents: project kickoff scheduled for Monday.

turns.title: Write then read-back verification
turns.prompt: Write 'hello world' to output.txt, then read it back to confirm.

turns.title: Three-tool chain (list, read, write)
turns.prompt: List the workspace files, read todo.txt, then write a summary of it to summary.txt.

read_file.output:
TODO:
- Fix login bug
- Deploy staging
- Write tests for auth module

turns.title: Delayed reuse of echo (last used turn 1)
turns.prompt: Use the echo tool to repeat: context pressure checkpoint.

turns.title: Distractor resistance (only read_file needed)
turns.prompt: Read config.json. Do not modify anything.

turns.title: Standing rule retention (bullet point format)
turns.prompt: Summarize everything you have done so far in this session.

turns.title: Stateful list operations (add, read, update)
turns.prompt: Add 'buy milk' to the list, then read the list, then update that item to 'buy 2 liters of oat milk'.

update_item.output: updated item 1: buy 2 liters of oat milk

turns.title: Date tool with no side effects
Four-tool chain under pressure
turns.prompt: Get today's date, list all files, read notes.txt, and append today's date to notes.txt.

read_file.output: Reminder: meeting at 3pm. Bring laptop and charger.

turns.title: Rule retention after 11 turns of context
turns.prompt: Read todo.txt and summarize the tasks.

read_file.output:
TODO:
- Fix login bug
- Deploy staging
- Write tests for auth module

turns.title: Write chain correctness (read, transform, write)
turns.prompt: Read config.json, change the port to 9090, and write it back.

turns.title: Refuse hallucinated tool (send_email does not exist)
turns.prompt: Send an email to my team about the deployment.

turns.title: Five-tool chain (maximum pressure)
turns.prompt: Get today's date, list files, read todo.txt, write a dated status report to status.txt, then read it back to confirm.

list_files.output:
notes.txt
todo.txt
config.json
output.txt
summary.txt
status.txt

read_file.output:
TODO:
- Fix login bug
- Deploy staging
- Write tests for auth module

Status Report 2026-04-10:
- Login bug: in progress
- Staging: pending
- Auth tests: not started

turns.title: Simple echo after 15 turns of context
Session memory recall under full context load
turns.prompt: Without using any file tools, tell me: what was the port number in config.json, and what were the three TODO items?

turns.title: Final standing rule adherence check
turns.prompt: Summarize every tool you used in this entire session, in order.
